mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO ops_ro_confirm_log(invoice_no, do_id, order_id, order_item, split_item_no,cre_time, creator, receive_type, ro_id, pco_id, status,batch_no,invoice_id) values
( #{item.invoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.doId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.orderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.orderItem,jdbcType=INTEGER},#{item.splitItemNo,jdbcType=INTEGER},#{item.creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},#{item.creator,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.receiveType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.roId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.pcoId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.batchNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.invoiceId,jdbcType=BIGINT} )
